title: Pala Palakkura Lyrics Ayan
stanzas:
pala palakkura pagala nee
pada padakkara agala nee
anal adikkira pugala nee
nagalin nagala nee

mazhai adikkira mughila nee
thimir adikkira thigila nee
mana manakura agila nee
mulla malara nee

soodaga illa vittal
rathathil vegam illai
settaigal illa vittal
inimai illai
pootai thaan thaanda vittal
vannathu poochi illai
veettai nee thaanda vittal
vaanamey illai

vaana villai poley ilamayada
thinam puthumayada,
adhai anubavida
kaalam kaalamaagha
perusunggada
romba pazhasungada
nee munney munney vaada vaada

etti thodum vayadhu idhu
oru vettu kathi pol irukumm
athisayam yenna-vendral
athan iru pakkam koor-irukkum

kanavakku seyal koduthaal
andha sooriyanil sedi mulaikumm
pulangalai adakki vaithaal
dhinam pudhu pudhu
sugam kidaikumm

kaalil kothum aani
un yeni yetru kaami
pala inban vali serthu
oru mottai katti vaa nee vaa nee

idhu varai nenjil irukum
sila thunban-galai naam marappom
gadigaaram mul tholaithu
thodu vaanam varai poi varuvom

adai maazhai vaasal vanthaal
kaiyil kudai-indri vaa nanaivom
adaiyaalam-thaan thuarappom
yella desathillum poi vasipom

yenna kondu vanthom
naam yenna kondu povom
ada indha nodi podhum
va vera enna vendum vendum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Pala Palakkura?

The song Pala Palakkura expresses deep emotions of love and longing, portraying the beauty of romantic relationships.

How does Pala Palakkura fit into the plot of Ayan?

In Ayan, Pala Palakkura serves as a pivotal moment that highlights the romantic connection between the lead characters.

Who is the singer of Pala Palakkura?

The song is sung by the talented artist Hariharan, known for his soulful voice and emotive singing style.

Who composed the music for Pala Palakkura?

The music for Pala Palakkura was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, who is celebrated for his catchy and melodious tunes.

When was Pala Palakkura released?

Pala Palakkura was released on January 19, 2009, as part of the movie Ayan.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pala Palakkura, the protagonist expresses heartfelt emotions of love and yearning, encapsulating the essence of romance in Ayan. The song's soothing melody and poetic lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing, making it a perfect backdrop for romantic moments. Hariharan's soulful rendition adds depth to the emotions conveyed, allowing listeners to connect with the feelings of love. Overall, the song beautifully illustrates the complexities of love, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pala Palakkura from the movie Ayan is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Hariharan's soulful vocals and Harrish Jeyaraj's enchanting composition, this song is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Experience the magic of Pala Palakkura as it transports you to a world of romance and emotion.
stanzaMeanings: You are the one who dances in the moonlight, but you are also the one who brings trouble.
You are the cloud that brings rain, the one who brings excitement, the one who fills the mind, and the blooming flower.
If there is no market, there is no speed in the chariot; without challenges, there is no joy. If you give, there is no pest, and if you give to the house, there is no sky.
Like a bow in the sky, it’s a new day; experience it as time goes by. You are very precious, so come forward.
This is a sharp knife that cuts through the stomach; it will reveal wonders if you ask for it.
If you give action to a dream, it will bloom in the sunlight, and if you keep it, new happiness will come every day.
In the time of the elephant, your desires will be fulfilled; come, you are the one who brings joy.
Until now, we have forgotten some sorrows in our hearts; we will leave behind the burdens and go until the sky.
When the rain comes to the door, we will remember without an umbrella; we will go everywhere without any worries.
What have we brought with us, and what will we take away? At this moment, what else do we need?
